iframes.sandbox: allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-scripts allow-top-navigation-to-custom-protocols allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation
iframes.style: display: inline-block; width: 300px; height: 100px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;

transition-duration: 0.2s; transition-property: top; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 3px 5px; border-radius: 10px; display: block !important; position: relative !important; top: 0px !important; bottom: unset !important; left: unset !important; width: 100% !important; height: 250px !important; border: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; visibility: visible;

transition-duration: 0.2s; transition-property: top; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 3px 5px; border-radius: 10px; display: block !important; position: relative !important; top: 0px !important; bottom: unset !important; left: unset !important; width: 100% !important; height: 250px !important; border: 0px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; visibility: visible;
